subtopics.title: Meaning and Importance of Home Management
common_misconceptions: Home management is only for women
Home management is not a professional skill
subtopics.teaching_note: Home management = using available resources effectively to achieve family goals. Resources: human (knowledge, skills, time, energy), non-human (money, materials, equipment, space). Management process: planning, organizing, implementing, evaluating. DECIDE steps: Define problem, Establish criteria, Consider alternatives, Investigate consequences, Decide and act, Evaluate. Nigerian context: managing resources is especially important given economic challenges - budgeting, meal planning, time management between work and family.

subtopics.title: Types and Functions of Family
common_misconceptions: Nuclear family is better than extended family
Family only means parents and children
subtopics.teaching_note: Nigerian context: Extended family is prevalent and culturally important - includes grandparents, uncles, aunts, cousins. Compound family setting common in rural areas. Family functions: reproduction, socialization of children, economic support, emotional support, protection. Marriage types: monogamy (one spouse) and polygamy (multiple spouses - polygyny: one man multiple wives; polyandry: one woman multiple husbands, rare). Kinship terms in Nigerian languages reflect extended family structure.
